headline: Mastercard Pushes AI And Crypto Payments While Shaping Future Fee Economics
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) and Santander completed Europe’s first live AI agent initiated payment within a regulated banking framework. Mastercard and MetaMask launched a self-custody crypto debit card that allows users to spend digital assets in everyday transactions. These developments highlight Mastercard’s push into AI powered payments and crypto linked consumer spending products. For you as an investor looking at Mastercard, these moves sit at the core of its business as a global payments...

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 We Avoid
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.
